title: DONQL Birthday Cake Candles 24PCS, Tall Cake Candles, Long Birthday Candles, Thin Cupcake Candles with Holders for Birthday Cake Baby Shower Cake Wedding Party Decoration (24Pcs Champagne)
features: 【Thin and Long】 You will receive 24pcs birthday candles in 4 boxes, each box for 6pcs. The height of the birthday candles is 14cm/5.5 inch and the burning time is about 15 minutes that can sing several rounds of happy birthday with these.

【Colorful Birthday Candles】The colorful candles are suitable for both boys and girls.The colors of the candles are very beautiful and bright and they made a beautiful scene.The pastel color makes them really refined and versatile.
【Hold Up Well with Stand Base】At the base there is a plastic cover that prevents the wax from dripping on the cake.Birthday candles are wonderful cake topper.
【Odor-free and Non-toxic】The birthday candles cake candles are made of quality wax material, odor-free and non-toxic, safe for your use,The slender candles can decorate your cake perfectly.

【Beautiful Candles for Any Occasion】 The classic cake candles are perfect for birthday, Mother's Day, wedding party, bridal shower or baby shower etc.If you want to make your party more colorful and creative,these would be highly recommended.
description: Product Description These pastel candles are ideal for birthday parties, engagement parties, outdoor dinners and baby showers. The height of the birthday candles is 14cm/5.5 inch and the burning time is about 15 minutes The long candles for cake have rich color which could make your cake more beautiful. The colors of the tall cake candles are very beautiful and bright and they made a beautiful scene. See More
